38.reason: [This condition is flawed: if the last exponent is 0, it breaks early and skips processing the digit '0'. Also, loop index `i` may go out of bounds because inner loops increment `i` and outer loop increments again.]

114.reason: [After merging terms, the loop doesn't recheck the current index `i` against the new next term, potentially missing consecutive duplicates. Also, accessing `ans[j + 1]` when `j == cnt` reads out-of-bounds (undefined behavior).]
